message:
feat(ui): add workspace/source drilldown filters, focus trap re-entry guard, and markdown theme enhancements

Extend the analytics drilldown to support workspace and source dimensions
so users can drill from analytics breakdowns into filtered search results
with all active filters (agent, workspace, source, model) displayed.

- Add workspace and source_filter fields to DrilldownContext for
  dimension-specific filtering when drilling from analytics breakdowns
- Implement focus trap re-entry prevention to stop trap stacking when
  users rapidly press Enter/V while the detail modal is already open,
  which previously locked the UI
- Add syntax highlighting to both markdown message detail rendering
  locations via .with_syntax_theme(styles.syntax_highlight_theme())
- Customize markdown table rendering with themed borders, header cells,
  alternating row colors, and dimmed dividers instead of defaults
- Add syntax_highlight_theme() method to style system that returns dark
  or light theme based on current mode setting
- Enhance drilldown status messages to display all active filter context
- Add comprehensive test coverage for new filter behavior, re-entry
  prevention, scroll state preservation, and empty pane fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
